title: Raion's Vanilla Plus
description: Raion's Vanilla Plus enhances the classic Minecraft experience with subtle visual, performance, and quality-of-life tweaks. All fully removable and world-safe.
body:
# Raion's Vanilla Plus

This modpack is lightweight and built to keep the **authentic Minecraft feel** intact with just enough tweaks to make it smoother, prettier, and more playable.

## Features
- ✔️ Quality-of-life improvements  
- 🎨 Visual and performance enhancements  
- 🔧 Fully optional - mods can be removed without breaking your world

Originally made for me and a few friends, now shared for anyone who loves **pure Minecraft**, just a bit more refined.
